public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as watch sergeant.
appearance: Quota-practical armor, work-hardened layers, and visibly maintained equipment mark function before ceremony.
manner: Treats routine contact like the first layer of incident response, never fully relaxing into casual talk. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a watch sergeant still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of watch sergeant in and around Duneshade Outpost, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Duneshade Outpost workable through the obligations of watch sergeant while managing the immediate pressure of water scarcity in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must notice trouble early enough that force remains legitimate rather than merely reactive. Around Duneshade Outpost, that usually means carrying water scarcity, subterranean predators, convoy delay without letting the role of watch sergeant visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Helga Ashmason can draw the party into contraband, false papers, or a suspicious cargo problem tied to Duneshade Outpost.
Any task accepted from Helga Ashmason may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V30_3 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Helga Ashmason as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named. In Duneshade Outpost, this lands inside a public field already shaped by route captains, rationing families.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Watch Sergeant, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
what_they_refuse: Helga Ashmason refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
